description: Ensure seamless travel experiences with our comprehensive template, designed to provide all the essential information related to your airline journey. This includes crucial details from booking to check-in, helping you stay organized and informed. The template is ideal for flight confirmation, offering a clear, concise summary of your upcoming trip. It belongs to the realm of Travel, Notification, Re-Engagement, and Transactional communication, ensuring your travel plans run smoothly. Navigate through your airplane journey with ease, as our template keeps you updated at every step. Enjoy peace of mind knowing you have all your flight details at your fingertips.
short_description: Stay organized and informed with our comprehensive template, ideal for flight confirmation. It provides essential details from booking to check-in for a seamless airline journey. Perfect for Travel, Notification, Re-Engagement, and Transactional communication, our template ensures smooth travel experiences by keeping you updated at every step.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.

HI JAMES

Your trip to Helsinki starts on 04.12.2020. Make your trip easier, and check in online now for yourself and your travel companions. Also check out our additional service below, and make the most of your trip.

mobile application

 
 

Push for change

Start with us the journey towards a more sustainable future by offsetting your aviation emissions or supporting the use of biofuels.

Take advantage of a 20% discount on in-flight purchases

You will receive a 20% discount on tax-free purchases made on the flight from December 16, 2020 to January 12, 2021. Take a look at the offer and find your favorite products in our wide selection!
